author: Nguyễn Văn Duy
description: A Red-DiscordBot cog suite for preserve-first server reconciliation, operational logging, GitHub workflows, feed and music automation, study productivity, and persistent bot health reporting.
install_msg: Repository added. Run `[p]cog list red-cogs`, install only the cogs your server needs, and read each cog's documentation before enabling structural mutations, logging, external integrations, or automated data flows.
short: Structured Discord operations and personal automation for Red.
